metadata.description: DevOps & Cloud Engineer based in France, passionate about Kubernetes, cloud-native platforms and infrastructure automation.

shortDescription.catchPhrase: Building resilient, scalable and secure infrastructure

about.catchPhrase: I am a DevOps & Cloud Engineer passionate about Kubernetes, cloud-native platforms and infrastructure automation, based in France.

experiences.description: Long-term mission in aerospace, evolving from fullstack developer to DevOps & Cloud engineer within a dedicated infrastructure team.
tasks: Built a cybersecurity incident management app from scratch as sole developer — requirements to production (Angular 21, Spring Boot 4, MariaDB, Docker) — then onboarded two developers.
Joined a dedicated infrastructure team to design and build a hybrid cloud platform (OVH Cloud + on-premises) hosting internal applications.
Configured and secured a managed Kubernetes cluster (ArgoCD, Kyverno).

experiences.description: Brought back on the same project in a DevOps capacity, leading the migration of the application to Kubernetes to reduce costs and improve reliability.
tasks: Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines with GitLab CI.
Guided development teams in adopting cloud-native practices (stateless, scalable, resilient services).
Deployed and operated the application on a Kubernetes cluster.

experiences.description: Built a private cloud platform for a major financial client in Luxembourg, as part of a team of Kubernetes consultants.
tasks: Deployed OpenShift on bare-metal, VMware, and Nutanix infrastructures.
Configured LDAP integration, external storage, monitoring, and security policies.
Produced technical documentation to onboard the client onto the platform.

experiences.description: Full-stack development of an internal web application serving thousands of daily users, within an 8-person Scrum team.
tasks: Developed UI features on an Angular frontend.
Maintained a large-scale Java backend (1M+ lines of code, 15+ year history).

experiences.description: Research internship developing an augmented reality application to protect workers' eyesight from LED exposure.
tasks: Built an Android AR application in Java with OpenGL ES.
Co-authored a [scientific paper](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/358315478_Occupational_eye_protection_using_Augmented_Reality_a_proof_of_concept) with my supervisor on the application.

contact.title: Let's work together.
contact.placeholder: Hello Sacha! We have an interesting project we would like to discuss with you. Reach us at our email address:

success.title: Message sent!
success.description: I will get back to you as soon as possible.
